headline: How The Investment Story For Waste Connections (WCN) Is Shifting With New Guidance And Cash Needs
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for Waste Connections has adjusted slightly from US$198.75 to US$198.92, signaling only a very small tweak to the underlying valuation work. That kind of modest move fits with the latest research tone, where enthusiasm for the company’s business quality sits alongside fresh caution around 2026 guidance, project related spending, and recycled commodity pricing. As you read on, you will see how these cross currents are shaping the analyst narrative and what to...
